name: Kim Budil
quote: The pursuit of fusion ignition in the laboratory is one of the most significant scientific challenges ever tackled by humanity, and achieving it is a triumph of science, engineering, and most of all, people.

name: Pietro Barabaschi
quote: The Baseline 2024 schedule is realistic and achievable. For the first time since I joined ITER, we met all of our spending targets in 2024. That is a significant sign of organizational maturity.

name: Bob Mumgaard
quote: We're building the thing that will change the world. We are going to build a power plant and it's going to work. The magnets work, the physics works — now we execute.

name: David Kirtley
quote: Our goal is to demonstrate electricity production from fusion and deliver power to the grid. The Microsoft agreement isn't just a press release — it has real financial milestones and penalties that keep us honest.

name: Sam Altman
role: Lead Investor, Helion Energy; CEO, OpenAI
quote: Fusion energy is likely the most important technology humans will develop in the 21st century. The progress at Helion over the past few years has been extraordinary.

name: Dennis Whyte
role: Professor of Nuclear Science & Engineering, MIT; CFS Co-founder
quote: We decided to bet on high-temperature superconducting magnets and a compact, high-field approach. Most people thought it was too early. The September 2021 magnet test changed the conversation permanently.

name: Sibylle Günter
role: Scientific Director, Max-Planck-Institut für Plasmaphysik; Wendelstein 7-X Director
quote: Wendelstein 7-X demonstrates that a stellarator can reach the plasma quality needed for a fusion power plant. The steady-state capability of stellarators is a key advantage we must not overlook.

name: Tony Donné
quote: Europe's strength in fusion comes from our coordinated approach across 25+ research institutions. JET's legacy and JT-60SA's first plasma show that multinational collaboration delivers results.

name: Si-Woo Yoon
role: Research Center Director, KSTAR / Korea Institute of Fusion Energy
quote: KSTAR's 48-second record demonstrates that we can sustain the plasma conditions needed for commercial fusion. Our target of 300 seconds by 2026 will be the most stringent test yet of our tungsten divertor upgrade.

name: Jill Hruby
role: Under Secretary for Nuclear Security; Administrator, NNSA
quote: The NIF ignition result opens a fundamentally new regime in high energy density science. The national security and clean energy implications of this achievement will be felt for decades.

name: Yoo Suk-jae
role: President, Korea Institute of Fusion Energy (KFE)
quote: Korea's investment in KSTAR and ITER reflects our commitment to clean energy leadership in Asia. We are not just participants in the global fusion race — we intend to be among the first to the finish line.

name: Jennifer Granholm
quote: This is one of the most impressive scientific feats of the 21st century. With this achievement, today we are announcing fusion has now joined the ranks of great American scientific achievements.

name: Michl Binderbauer
quote: We are ready to move from laboratory to power plant. Our site evaluation tour across Alabama, Ohio, and Texas demonstrates that we are executing a concrete commercial deployment plan for the 2030s — not just promising fusion 'someday'.

name: Conner Prochaska
quote: This $135 million commitment to fusion — the largest in ARPA-E's history — reflects our conviction that the technical barriers to commercial fusion are surmountable in the near term. The time to accelerate is now.
